rationale: The two ensures-runs each tie post_i back to pre_self_ field-by-field and via four forall quantifiers, but z3 can't chain them because the per-run triggers (post1_self_.pcid_active(p) vs post2_self_.pcid_active(p), etc.) are disjoint. The prelude re-asserts each conjunct against the common pre_self_, then for each forall uses an assert-forall-by with a case split (on p == pcid for pcid-quantifiers; trivial for ioid-quantifiers) that instantiates BOTH runs' ensures on the same witness, collapsing post1 and post2 to pre and hence to each other.
